comment: Build-time pre-rendered TTS clips for the fixed core vocabulary. Generated by tools/tts/generate_clips.dart (maintainer-run, never run on a normal build). Clips are committed; the GCP API key is not. See tools/tts/README.md and docs/adr/0004-tts-strategy.md amendment.

provider.name: Google Cloud Text-to-Speech
provider.license: Audio synthesized by Google Cloud Text-to-Speech may be embedded in and distributed with this application per the Google Cloud Platform Terms of Service. No attribution is required in-app; this note records provenance.

clips.voice_out: I need to go to the bathroom
